data.title: EVA Live Inc.’s Revenues Surge 82.6% to $17M as Company Swings to $8.1M Net Income
data.description: Los Angeles, California - EVA Live, Inc. revealed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2025. The report signifies a noteworthy transition for EVA Live, Inc. as it experienced substantial progress in revenue generation, a broader client base, and a significant shift towards profitability during the stated fiscal year. Additionally, the company, listed as Nasdaq: GOAI, a pioneer in artificial intelligence-based digital advertising and automation, is based out of Los Angeles, California.

data.title: Tejon Ranch Co. Board Intends to Include Shareholder Special Meeting Right Proposal for Consideration at the 2026 Annual Meeting
data.description: Tejon Ranch Company has announced its plan to introduce a proposal for a Shareholder Special Meeting Right at the upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting. This proposal will allow shareholders to convene a special meeting by vote, highlighting the company's commitment to shareholder engagement. The initiative is set to be a significant development for shareholders as it aims to enhance their ability to have a say in important decisions. This proposal underscores the company's dedication to corporate governance and transparency. Shareholders will have the opportunity to vote on this proposal during the upcoming annual meeting.

data.title: QuSecure Banking Deployment Spotlighted in Proposed SEC Post-Quantum Financial Infrastructure Framework as Real-World Proof for Post-Quantum Migration
data.description: In San Mateo, California, QuSecure's implementation of post-quantum cryptography (PQC) in collaboration with Banco Sabadell and Accenture has been recognized by the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) as the leading example for industry-wide adoption strategies. This achievement marks a significant milestone in the banking sector’s efforts to enhance security measures against quantum threats.

data.title: Restaurants Boost AI and Tech Investment Amid Margin Pressure, But Operational Gaps Persist
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia, Qu, a leader in the restaurant industry's unified commerce platform, has published its seventh Restaurant Technology Benchmark Report. The report reveals that despite financial challenges, restaurant brands are making significant technology investments, particularly in AI, to address economic difficulties and dwindling customer visits. An important finding highlights the operational obstacles faced by restaurant brands, such as discrepancies between order processing and food preparation, resulting in a fragmented guest experience.

data.title: Rubrik Data Protection for Google Workspace Helps Enterprise Customers Achieve End-to-End Cyber Resilience
data.description: Rubrik, a Security and AI Operations Company based in Palo Alto, California, has introduced Rubrik Data Protection for Google Workspace, targeting the increasing adoption of Google Workspace. This service is aimed at providing cybersecurity resilience to the more than 11 million enterprises utilizing Google Drive and Gmail. Google Workspace, a collection of AI productivity tools facilitating remote collaboration for teams, contains essential data for numerous businesses. Rubrik's new offering is designed to enhance data protection within this platform.

data.title: New Report Reveals Surprising Trends in Ohio Airport Accidents
data.description: A recent report by The Kryder Law Group, LLC Accident and Injury Lawyers in Columbus, Ohio, studied ten years of aviation data in Ohio. The findings show that the majority of airport accidents happen outside major hubs. The report emphasizes that out of a total of [insert number] accidents analyzed, a significant portion took place away from major aviation centers. This data underscores the importance of addressing safety measures not only at busy airport locations but also in less-central aviation areas to reduce the overall number of incidents.

data.title: Outpost Expands Logistics Infrastructure Network with Five New Properties and Strategic EV Investment
data.description: Outpost, a company specializing in truck terminal ownership, operation, and automation, has revealed the incorporation of five new properties in Newark, Miami, and various locations in California. This expansion signifies Outpost's introduction into the primary freight corridor of the Northeast, as well as an intensified presence in the bustling freight hubs of South Florida and California. The company has also made a significant investment in EV Realty, a prominent developer in the industry.

data.title: TWO Receives Unsolicited Proposal
data.description: In New York, Two Harbors Investment Corp. (NYSE: TWO) revealed receiving an unsolicited offer to purchase all outstanding shares at $10.70 per share in cash today. The proposal also includes covering the $25.4 million termination fee owed to UWM Holdings Corporation (NYSE: UWMC).

data.title: VENU CEO J.W. Roth Signals Accelerating Growth as $86M Capital Raise Surpasses Expectations on Schwab Network’s Opening Bell
data.description: In Colorado Springs, the Venu Holding Corporation (NYSE American: VENU), known for its premium entertainment and hospitality venues, shared that its Founder, Chairman, and CEO, J.W. Roth, participated in an interview with Nicole Petallides on Schwab Network’s Opening Bell. They discussed the company's growth, increasing fan interest in live entertainment, and robust investor support driving its expansion. The conversation touched on VENU's initiatives in this area.

data.title: Henry Repeating Arms' New Rifle Series Gives Back to Our National Forests
data.description: A new line of commemorative rifles has been introduced by Henry Repeating Arms, a prominent firearm manufacturer in the US. These special edition rifles aim to support conservation initiatives across approximately 200 million acres of the country's national forests and grasslands. The launch took place in Rice Lake, Wisconsin on March 19, 2026.

data.title: El Quinto Partido, A Canela Deportes Original Series, Presented by Hyundai, to Debut on Canela.TV
data.description: A new documentary series, led by Julián Gil, explores Mexico's journey to overcome the challenge of reaching the elusive Fifth Match at the World Cup. The series includes interviews with famous soccer legends and experts. Released in New York on March 19, 2026 by Canela Media, a top technology and innovation company.

data.title: Promoting Certified EVO Oil: PDO and PGI at the Heart of the Ecceukch Project
data.description: In Zurich, Switzerland, it has been highlighted that extra virgin olive oil (EVOO) is more than just a staple in Mediterranean cuisine; it is also a key component of an internationally acknowledged healthy lifestyle. EVOO is renowned for its sensory and nutritional qualities, notably its abundance of polyphenols and monounsaturated fats, making it a cornerstone of the widely respected Mediterranean diet. This diet is celebrated globally for its beneficial impacts on health and sustainability. The significance of EVOO in promoting a healthy lifestyle is increasingly recognized, with its positive effects extending beyond culinary enjoyment.
